lane_4_error_classification.coordinator_ts2551_fixed: N/A - not found in actual smoke output (lines 508 error not reproduced)
lane_4_error_classification.note: coordinator.ts errors (classifyOperation, operator_context) successfully fixed. New errors in m11/mod.ts are pre-existing export mismatches revealed after TS1343 fix unblocked deeper type checking.

lane_5_key_insight.progressive_error_exposure: Each fix unblocks deeper type checking, exposing previously-hidden errors. R151D fixed TS2345 → exposed TS1343. R151E fixed TS1343 → exposed m11/mod.ts export mismatches. R151E2 fixed coordinator.ts → exposed m11/mod.ts structural errors.
lane_5_key_insight.error_masking_chain: TS1343 was blocking type-checking from reaching m11/mod.ts. Without NODE_OPTIONS, ts-jest diagnostics stopped at runtime_paths.ts:4. With NODE_OPTIONS, diagnostics proceeded to coordinator.ts (fixed), then to m11/mod.ts where it found 13+ export mismatches.

lane_7_next_phase.reason: coordinator.ts errors fixed; smoke now fails due to m11/mod.ts export mismatches (RuntimeBackflow missing, VersionComparisonResult→VersionComparison, OutcomeRecord/OutcomeGap missing, ConstitutionalRule vs ConstitutionRule, etc.). R151E3 must fix m11/mod.ts exports before tests can execute.

coordinator_ts_fixes: operator_context possibly-undefined fixed with optional chaining
